name: open_checkpoint
short_description: Open a design checkpoint in a new project
full_help:
open_checkpoint

Description: 
Open a design checkpoint in a new project

Syntax: 
open_checkpoint  [-part <arg>] [-ignore_timing] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-part]           Override the checkpoint part. Note that this may cause 
                    errors if the checkpoint contains xdef.
  [-ignore_timing]  reload a checkpoint without the timing constraints. Will 
                    not work if '-time' option given.
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>            Design checkpoint file

Categories: 
Project
